title: Grant Proposal Template
description: A comprehensive template for writing winning grant proposals. Includes sections for executive summary, problem statement, project description, budget, and M&E plan.

title: Project Budget Template
description: Detailed budget template with formulas for personnel, activities, materials, travel, and overhead costs. Includes budget narrative and justification sections.

title: Concept Note Template
description: A concise 2-3 page concept note template for initial expressions of interest. Covers problem statement, proposed solution, target beneficiaries, and estimated budget.

title: M&E Framework Template
description: Comprehensive monitoring and evaluation framework with indicators, data collection methods, frequency, and responsible parties. Includes results framework and logical framework.

title: Project Plan Template
description: Complete project planning template with Gantt chart, activity timeline, resource allocation, risk matrix, and progress tracking dashboard.

title: Funding Assessment Checklist
description: A comprehensive checklist to assess organizational readiness, funding source suitability, and partnership evaluation. Includes scoring system and recommendations.
